scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/server/public dist/.openai && cp worker/index.js dist/server/index.js && cp index.html Heckert-Fight-Sponsorship-Deck.pdf Heckert-Fight-Sponsorship-Deck.pptx dist/server/public/ && cp -R assets dist/server/public/assets && cp .openai/hosting.json dist/.openai/hosting.json
